source.edition_note: Draft passage record derived from BS_C01_S02::BS_C01_S02_V02_VERSETEXT_01.

translation.literal_translation: And because the intended qualities are tenable. (2)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.2: Brahman is the referent since the meditation-relevant predicates are coherently applicable there.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra statement keyed to vivaksita-guna hermeneutics.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Primary interpretive referent under adjudication in this adhikarana

uncertainty_notes: Long bhashya blocks translated as draft prose and require line-level philological curation.
Terminology retained in mixed transliteration/English where doctrinal precision is required.
